items.reviewerNotes: Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: Options reordered; French key C (demerit points accumulation recording system) maps to master D (accumulated penalty points system). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: MCQ option rows align; French key D (It is prohibited to drive or stop on the emergency lane except in case of emergency.) maps to master D (is not allowed to drive or stop in the emergency lane in a non-emergency case). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Prompt asks when hazard warning lights may be used. Options include 'traffic jam' and 'follow preceding vehicles' which are ambiguous across jurisdictions; no clear matching qid in candidates. Keep unresolved until legal/local guideline confirmed (likely only for breakdown/emergency).

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: MCQ option rows align; French key D (Gently press the pedal intermittently) maps to master D (intermittently and gently depress). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: ROW unique detail matches: If the vehicle cannot find a place to stop, it can stop on the sidewalk.. True/false polarity is Wrong; French key B (No) maps to that polarity. Rejected top q0307: it is weaker on the strict prompt/option/detail comparison. Top hard-locked q0307 was not reused; selected qid has closer unique-detail/polarity semantics for this French item.

Codex medium-risk keepUnresolved: Question about priority on narrow mountain road; candidate set shows conflicting mappings (some candidates say mountain-side first, others say away-from-mountain first). Local option wording (montagne vs à pic) ambiguous; cannot confidently map to existing qid.

Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex ultra-strict approveExistingQid: Options reordered; French key D (wait one behind the other) maps to master C (follow the vehicles in front). Prompt and option-row concepts were checked against qbank; answer key follows French order.

Codex medium-risk createNewQuestion: No candidate in shortlist exactly addresses 'hitting monuments or public installations' obligation to stop/report; source correct answer is 'No' (B).
